title: Add the ability to do transfer ownership operations via the API
excerpt: It would be very very helpful to have access to the transfer ownership feature via the API. We conduct all possible off-boarding actions via API,  and while this one is easy to do via the console, having this action via …

posts.author: a350h (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very very helpful to have access to the transfer ownership feature via the API. We conduct all possible off-boarding actions via API, and while this one is easy to do via the console, having this action via API would be a great help
